nodes.label: Frontend Design System

nodes.label: CMV Visual Identity
nodes.rationale: The brand uses green concentric circles to symbolize precision in cost management (CMV) and financial targets.

nodes.label: React Logo
nodes.rationale: Standard React branding asset used in the frontend application to represent the core framework.

nodes.label: Vite Logo
nodes.rationale: Branding asset for the Vite build tool, featuring a stylized 'V' with gradient effects and bracket-like framing, used as the application's logo.
